description_long: This is a pair of sunglasses featuring a bold, full-rim rectangular frame with a vibrant, multicolored pattern reminiscent of pizza or snack food motifs. The frame is moderately thick, providing a sturdy and fashionable appearance, and the temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The lenses are large, slightly rounded rectangles with a green tint, offering ample coverage and a modern urban style. The bridge is a classic saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples display the same colorful pattern as the front, with some text or branding visible on the inner side. Overall, the glasses exude a playful, eye-catching aesthetic suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A pair of rectangular sunglasses with green-tinted lenses and a bold, multicolored patterned frame, featuring playful snack-themed graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, patterned temple and the inner text detail, with the frame's thickness and curve at the ear tip visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full-rim rectangular frame, large green-tinted lenses, and the vibrant multicolored pattern across the brow and temples.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same patterned temple and visible inner text, showing the frame's profile and ear curve.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and temples, with the colorful pattern wrapping around and the lens curvature visible.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with moderate thickness and straight temples that curve at the ends. The design is bold and playful, featuring a continuous, eye-catching pattern across the front and temples.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a solid green tint, providing a uniform coloration with moderate transparency and no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: Classic saddle bridge, smoothly integrated into the frame without separate nose pads, offering a seamless connection between the lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight with a gentle curve at the tips, fully covered in the same vibrant, snack-themed pattern as the front. Inner side of the temples features printed text.
attribute_brand_logo: A printed logo or text is visible on the inner side of the temples, but the specific brand name is not clearly legible.
